memberdef.type: Kokkos::View< typename ConstInnerType< T, _SHAPE_ >::TYPE, typename DeviceView< T, _SHAPE_ >::array_layout, host_mirror_space, unmanaged_memory >
memberdef.definition: using ConstHostView = Kokkos::View<typename ConstInnerType<T, _SHAPE_>::TYPE, typename DeviceView<T,_SHAPE_>::array_layout, host_mirror_space, unmanaged_memory>
memberdef.name: ConstHostView

memberdef.type: Kokkos::View< typename ConstInnerType< T, _SHAPE_ >::TYPE, typename DeviceView< T, _SHAPE_ >::array_layout, memory_space, unmanaged_memory >
memberdef.definition: using ConstView = Kokkos::View<typename ConstInnerType<T, _SHAPE_>::TYPE, typename DeviceView<T,_SHAPE_>::array_layout, memory_space, unmanaged_memory>
memberdef.name: ConstView

memberdef.type: Kokkos::View< typename InnerType< T, _SHAPE_ >::TYPE, Kokkos::LayoutRight, unmanaged_memory >
memberdef.definition: using DeviceView = Kokkos::View<typename InnerType<T, _SHAPE_>::TYPE, Kokkos::LayoutRight, unmanaged_memory>
memberdef.name: DeviceView

memberdef.type: Kokkos::View< typename InnerType< T, _SHAPE_ >::TYPE, typename DeviceView< T, _SHAPE_ >::array_layout, host_mirror_space, unmanaged_memory >
memberdef.definition: using HostView = Kokkos::View<typename InnerType<T, _SHAPE_>::TYPE, typename DeviceView<T,_SHAPE_>::array_layout, host_mirror_space, unmanaged_memory>
memberdef.name: HostView

memberdef.type: std::conditional< std::is_same< execution_space, Kokkos::DefaultExecutionSpace >::value, DeviceView< double, 1 >::memory_space, host_mirror_space >::type
memberdef.name: memory_space

memberdef.type: Kokkos::View< typename ConstInnerType< T, _SHAPE_ >::TYPE, typename DeviceView< T, _SHAPE_ >::array_layout, memory_space, Kokkos::MemoryRandomAccess >
memberdef.definition: using RandomAccessView = Kokkos::View<typename ConstInnerType<T, _SHAPE_>::TYPE, typename DeviceView<T,_SHAPE_>::array_layout, memory_space, Kokkos::MemoryRandomAccess>
memberdef.name: RandomAccessView

memberdef.type: Kokkos::View< typename InnerType< T, _SHAPE_ >::TYPE, typename DeviceView< T, _SHAPE_ >::array_layout, memory_space, unmanaged_memory >
memberdef.definition: using View = Kokkos::View<typename InnerType<T, _SHAPE_>::TYPE, typename DeviceView<T,_SHAPE_>::array_layout, memory_space, unmanaged_memory>
memberdef.name: View

detaileddescription.para: Teste les methodes de l'interface Kokkos utilisees dans TRUST
